data.title: Two traders who lost about 50% on LIBRA bought a total of $926,000 of LIBRA again 4 hours ago
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Spot On Chain monitoring, despite the LIBRA Rug Pull controversy, some traders are still buying in large quantities after suffering losses: 
1. Trader "6jnGR" spent 2,536 SOL (478,000 US dollars) to buy 1.19 million LIBRA about 4 hours ago, and previously lost 4,570 SOL (885,000 US dollars, -48%). 
2. Trader "AjqxR" spent 448,000 US dollars USDC to buy 980,000 LIBRA about 4 hours ago, and previously lost 937,000 US dollars (-52%).

data.title: CoinGecko co-founder: The crypto market created 600,000 new tokens in January, setting a historical record
The total market value of stablecoins exceeded 225 billion US dollars, setting a new record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DefiLlama data shows that the total market value of stablecoins has exceeded 225 billion US dollars and is currently 225.302 billion US dollars, setting a new historical high; it has increased by 0.56% in the past week, and USDT's market share has dropped to 63.21%.

data.title: A trader who made $1.3 million on TRUMP used insider information to make $6.72 million on LIBRA
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a trader who made a profit of $1.3 million on TRUMP used insider information to make a profit of $6.72 million on LIBRA.
Before LIBRA went online, the trader created 2 new wallets and transferred funds to buy LIBRA. As soon as LIBRA went online, he used these two wallets to spend $2.02 million to buy 5.08 million LIBRA and quickly sold them for $8.74 million.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,700 USDT with a Narrowed 0.89% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 16, 2025, 04:04 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,700 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,700.179932 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.89% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew $22.62 million in OM and $17.12 million in USDT from Binance in the past 5 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, in the past 5 hours, a newly created wallet withdrew a total of 3 million OM (worth US$22.62 million) and US$17.12 million USDT from Binance.

data.title: U.S. congressman slams Trump's Meme coin as a scam, accusing Musk and DOGE team of weakening consumer protection
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: At a recent hearing of the U.S. House Financial Services Committee, Representative Ayanna Pressley expressed strong concerns about the growing prevalence of cryptocurrency scams and urged stronger consumer protection. She emphasized that the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) played an important role in combating fraud, but was disbanded under the influence of Trump and Musk, especially through the actions taken by the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).
Pressley pointed out that there are real cases in which individuals have lost their savings due to cryptocurrency scams, which highlights the urgent need for government intervention. Without the CFPB's safeguards, consumers are vulnerable to cryptocurrency scam schemes, which are still increasing.
Pressley also criticized Trump's launch of Meme Coin for causing losses to ordinary investors, calling it a scam. She contrasted Trump's actions with the CFPB's mission to protect consumers and called for the resumption of the agency's operations: "We need to reopen this important agency to complete its necessary work." (Bitcoin.com)

data.title: Solayer team member clarifies: Arunkumar Sugadevan has nothing to do with LIBRA
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Solayer team member Chaofan Shou posted on X: "Arunkumar Sugadevan has nothing to do with LIBRA. They just share the same market maker. I am deeply sorry for this wrong information. Arunkumar is located in Germany, and the relevant market maker is in Delhi, not Kelsier. More information will be announced soon."

data.title: Galaxy Report: Ethereum Dominates Enterprise Blockchain Adoption with Use Cases Like NFT and RWA Tokenization
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to a report by Christine Kim, vice president of research at Galaxy Digital, more than 50 traditional companies, including financial institutions such as Deutsche Bank and Paypal, and brands such as Louis Vuitton and Adidas, are developing cryptocurrency-specific applications on Ethereum and its L2 network, focusing on non-speculative use cases such as RWA tokenization, NFT, Web3 games, and scalable infrastructure.
Ethereum leads in RWA tokenization, with assets under custody valued at almost 10 times that of Stellar, the report said. Thirteen of the 20 financial institutions building crypto infrastructure issue RWA, including BlackRock BUIDL. Stablecoins are also booming on Ethereum, with Paypal's PYUSD and Robinhood's USDG driving a 70% supply surge in 2024, and Ethereum accounting for more than 50% of the $400 billion stablecoin market.
Scalable infrastructure investment emphasizes enterprise adoption. Deutsche Bank is developing an Ethereum L2 compliant financial solution with ZKSync, while Sony’s L2 project Soneium targets gaming and entertainment. These projects highlight Ethereum’s role as a custom foundation for enterprise-grade blockchains.
In addition, Ethereum’s L2 centralized roadmap balances scalability and security, attracting institutions seeking effective on-chain solutions. Regulatory tailwinds, including the SEC’s focus on tokenization, and partnerships like Stripe’s $1 billion acquisition of stablecoin platform Bridge, show growing mainstream adoption.
Galaxy’s report concluded that Ethereum remains the chain of choice for financial-focused crypto services, with RWAs and stablecoins poised to expand in 2025. Kim noted: “As the most decentralized general-purpose blockchain with the broadest reach for crypto-native users and the longest network uptime record, Ethereum is the gateway many institutions use to incubate and launch financial-focused crypto services and products.”

data.title: A whale spent 2.5 million USDC to build a LIBRA position three hours ago and then sold it at a loss of nearly $700,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the transactions of LIBRA front row exceeding one million US dollars in the past 24 hours are all swing trading. Among them, the whale 5AS99...H48Sm seems to be doing T in the opposite direction, losing $695,000 in seven minutes. Three hours ago, he spent 2.5 million USDC to buy at an average price of $0.5206. Just after the position was established, it plummeted five minutes later, and could only sell in batches at an average price of $0.3759.
